metadata.title: Talking Cities - Self-Guided Audio Tours
metadata.description: Immersive audio tours that bring Polish history to life through the voices of those who lived it.

hero.title: The city is speaking.
hero.subtitle: Uncover the hidden stories of Polish cities, through the voices of those who built them.

valueProposition.title: History Through Human Voices
valueProposition.subtitle: We don't give you textbook dates. We give you human experiences.
valueProposition.immersiveAudioDesc: Stories narrated by the people who lived them, in 2 languages.
valueProposition.gpsGuidedDesc: Audio plays automatically as you walk. History unfolds at every corner.
valueProposition.socialImpactDesc: 40% of net profits go directly to the elderly narrators who share their stories.

howItWorks.title: Two Ways to Experience History
howItWorks.fromAnywhereDesc: Browse our free archive of oral histories. Preserving memory, accessible to all.
howItWorks.onTheStreetsDesc: Take our GPS self-guided tours. Stories play automatically as you walk alongside the city's invisible protagonists.

cities.title: New Stories
cities.subtitle: Exclusive interviews with the protagonists of history

commitment.title: Your Visit Sustains Memory
commitment.description: By purchasing a tour, you become a patron of this project. After covering operating costs, we reinvest 40% of net profits to fund grocery cards for the elderly narrators who share their stories. Their memories sustain culture; your visit sustains them.
commitment.statLabel: % of net profits returned to narrators

tours.pageSubtitle: Discover Polish history through immersive GPS-guided walking tours, available in 2 languages.
tours.allToursDeveloping: All tours are currently under development. Available in Polish and English.
tours.offlineAccess: Offline access to audio, maps, and GPS data
tours.inAppMap: Integrated in-app map with your location
tours.freeStoryDesc: Read the complete oral history article for this city — completely free.
tours.poweredBy: Our tours are powered by VoiceMap GPS technology
tours.comingSoonDesc: This tour is currently in development.
tours.step1Desc: Get the free app from Apple Store or Google Play.
tours.step2Desc: Search for "Talking Cities" in the app.
tours.step3Desc: Buy the tour and download for offline use.
tours.step4Desc: Go to the start point. Audio plays automatically via GPS.
tours.downloadAppDesc: Our tours run on VoiceMap, the leading GPS-guided audio tour platform. Download the free app to get started.

stories.pageSubtitle: A growing archive of voices that preserve Poland's living memory. Browse, listen, and connect with history — all at no cost.
stories.relatedTourDesc: Walk the streets where this history unfolded with our GPS-guided audio tour.

contact.pageSubtitle: Have questions, suggestions, or a story to share? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.witnessDesc: If you lived through significant historical events in Polish cities and would like to share your story, we'd be honored to hear from you.

footer.tagline: Preserving history through the voices of those who lived it.

common.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

journalistNote.title: ✍️ Journalist's Note
journalistNote.voicesText: To build this tour, we handed the microphone to those who lived behind the Iron Curtain. By walking these streets with their testimonies, you don't just listen to history; you become a patron. Your purchase directly funds the elders who share their memory with us today.
journalistNote.buildingsText: As a journalist, I've always believed that every wall has a story. This tour isn't a simple list of architectural facts; it's the result of deep archival research to bring you the raw pulse of the foundations that built this city.
